homepage.title: URL Shortener, Branded Short Links & Analytics
homepage.subtitle: Shorten, track, and manage your links with powerful analytics and custom branded domains — all in one place.
homepage.termsText: By clicking Shorten, you agree with our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Use of Cookies.
homepage.qrDescription: Scan this QR code to open the URL
homepage.qrHelp: Paste any URL and generate a QR code. Download or share it anywhere.
homepage.analyticsDesc: Stay on top of your links' performance and get insights into the clicks you earn and people you reach.
homepage.brandedDomainsDesc: Customize every part of your links with branded domains — say goodbye to default link shortening!
homepage.bulkDesc: Scale your communications with our API, and create thousands of unique short links in the blink of an eye.
homepage.linkManagementDesc: Take full control of your links: search, edit, and manage thousands at a time from a convenient dashboard.
homepage.quickEasyTitle: Link Shortening Done Quick and Easy
homepage.quickEasyDesc: Our URL shortener makes link management simple, fast, and effective — whether for personal use or enterprise campaigns.
homepage.waveGoodbye: Wave goodbye to long, clunky links and give your audiences the experiences they deserve!
homepage.oneStopTitle: Your One-Stop Solution for Branding and Managing Links
homepage.oneStopDesc: We offer a comprehensive suite of premium features to allow users to brand and manage links conveniently and confidently.
homepage.unlimitedClicksDesc: Track as many clicks as you earn with our Pro plans!
homepage.analytics2Desc: Get actionable, detailed insights into your social media, emails, ads, and more.
homepage.brandedDomains2Desc: Links shortened using your own custom domain are more professional and more clickable.
homepage.customLinksDesc: Create short links that put your brand front-and-center!
homepage.bulk2Desc: Shorten several links in a single go using our platform or API.
homepage.linkManagement2Desc: Worried about finding links in a tide of thousands? We solve that.
homepage.modernDesc: Built for marketers, creators, and businesses who need reliable link shortening with real-time analytics and full control.

url.signInError: Please sign in to shorten URLs
url.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
url.faq1A: {title} is a free tool that transforms long, complex URLs into short, shareable links. Track clicks, customize slugs, and manage all your short links from one dashboard.
url.faq2A: Yes, our basic URL shortening service is completely free. Sign up for a free account to access custom aliases, click analytics, branded domains, and more advanced features.
url.faq3A: Simply paste your long URL into the input field above and click the shorten button. Your short link will be generated instantly. For custom slugs and tracking, create a free account.

qr.faq1A: {title} is a free online tool that creates scannable QR codes you can use for marketing, events, business cards, and more. No signup required to generate basic QR codes.
qr.faq2A: Yes, our {title} is completely free to use. Generate unlimited QR codes without any cost. Sign up for a free account to access scan analytics, custom colors, and logo integration.
qr.faq3A: Enter your URL or content in the input field above and click generate. Your QR code will be generated instantly. Download it as PNG and use it anywhere.
qr.faq4Q: How long do QR codes last?
qr.faq4A: QR codes generated on our platform never expire. Static QR codes work indefinitely. Dynamic QR codes can be edited anytime without reprinting — perfect for updating offers or links.

free-url-shortener.title: Free URL Shortener
free-url-shortener.subtitle: 100% Free, No Strings Attached
free-url-shortener.description: Shorten unlimited URLs for free. No account required. Get clean short links with basic analytics — completely free forever.

howItWorks.desc: Enter any long URL — no signup needed.
Share your link and monitor clicks in real time.

custom-url-shortener.title: Custom URL Shortener
custom-url-shortener.subtitle: Personalize Your Links
custom-url-shortener.description: Create memorable, branded short links with custom slugs. Replace random characters with meaningful words that reflect your brand.

howItWorks.desc: Enter the long URL you want to shorten.
Pick a memorable word or phrase for your short link.
Use your custom link in emails, social media, and marketing.

seo.siteDescription: Free URL shortener with analytics, QR codes, and branded links
seo.orgDescription: RELURL is a free URL shortener service with analytics, QR codes, and branded short links.
